# Mission Proposal Template

> Replace bracketed placeholders in the consuming project. Do not commit client data back to this repository.

## 1. Cover

- Client: `[client name]`
- Proposal: `[mission title]`
- Date: `[yyyy-mm-dd]`
- Owner: `[team / contact]`
- Confidentiality: `[public / internal / confidential]`

## 2. Executive Summary

One paragraph:

- Business situation.
- Proposed mission.
- Expected outcome.
- Decision requested.

## 3. Context And Objectives

| Topic | Notes |
|---|---|
| Current context | `[facts, constraints, urgency]` |
| Business objectives | `[outcomes, KPIs, compliance, quality targets]` |
| User or operational stakes | `[teams impacted, workflows, pain points]` |
| Non-goals | `[what is deliberately out of scope]` |

## 4. Proposed Approach

| Phase | Finality | Deliverables | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Discover | Align scope and evidence | `[interviews, audit, inventory]` | `[checkpoint]` |
| 2. Design | Define target and plan | `[architecture, roadmap, backlog]` | `[review]` |
| 3. Build | Deliver increments | `[features, integrations, docs]` | `[demo, tests]` |
| 4. Transfer | Make the client autonomous | `[runbook, training, handover]` | `[acceptance]` |

## 5. Team And Governance

| Role | Responsibility | Allocation |
|---|---|---:|
| Engagement lead | Delivery ownership, steering, arbitration | `[x%]` |
| Product / functional consultant | Discovery, workflows, acceptance | `[x%]` |
| Technical lead | Architecture, quality, integration | `[x%]` |
| Engineer / designer | Build and documentation | `[x%]` |

Cadence:

- Weekly delivery checkpoint.
- Steering committee every `[n]` weeks.
- Decision log maintained in the client workspace.

## 6. Planning

| Milestone | Target date | Exit criteria |
|---|---|---|
| Kickoff | `[date]` | Stakeholders and scope confirmed |
| Baseline validated | `[date]` | Evidence and risks shared |
| First increment | `[date]` | Demoable value delivered |
| Acceptance | `[date]` | Criteria met, handover complete |

## 7. Assumptions And Dependencies

- Client availability: `[stakeholders, cadence]`
- Environments and access: `[systems, data, VPN, approvals]`
- Third-party dependencies: `[vendors, APIs, procurement]`
- Legal/security constraints: `[DPA, hosting, audit]`

## 8. Commercial Frame

| Item | Scope | Pricing placeholder |
|---|---|---|
| Mission delivery | `[scope summary]` | `[T&M / fixed / capped]` |
| Optional extension | `[scope summary]` | `[placeholder]` |
| Exclusions | `[out-of-scope items]` | N/A |

## 9. Risks

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| `[risk]` | `[impact]` | `[mitigation]` |

## 10. Next Steps

| Action | Owner | Date |
|---|---|---|
| Confirm scope | `[owner]` | `[date]` |
| Validate commercial model | `[owner]` | `[date]` |
| Schedule kickoff | `[owner]` | `[date]` |
